channel.title: Feeds Student Journalism and feeds about Journalism feeds

item.title: Gabriel Clement II to see homecoming at track and field’s Battle on the Bayou
item.description: Homecomings often elicit a wide range of emotions. And Gabriel Clement II said he is embracing them all. He is heading home. The junior sprinter will compete less than 100 miles away from his hometown of Kaplan, Louisiana, on Friday and Saturday at the Battle on the Bayou in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, where his family will cheer him on.
item.source:markdown: Homecomings often elicit a wide range of emotions. And Gabriel Clement II said he is embracing them all. He is heading home. The junior sprinter will compete less than 100 miles away from his hometown of Kaplan, Louisiana, on Friday and Saturday at the Battle on the Bayou in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, where his family will cheer him on.

item.title: Hawaiʻi, Indiana matchups give softball chance to bounce back after series loss
item.description: A quality team is determined not just by wins and losses, but by the ability to bounce back. And the Bruins have the opportunity to respond.
item.source:markdown: A quality team is determined not just by wins and losses, but by the ability to bounce back. And the Bruins have the opportunity to respond.

item.title: Film review: ‘Project Hail Mary’ is a stellar adaptation worth watching
item.description: Warning: spoilers ahead. All hail “Project Hail Mary,” a faithful and stellar adaptation of its source material. Derived from Andy Weir’s 2021 science fiction novel of the same name, “Project Hail Mary” from directors Phil Lord and Christopher Miller landed in theaters on March 20.
item.source:markdown: Warning: spoilers ahead. All hail “Project Hail Mary,” a faithful and stellar adaptation of its source material. Derived from Andy Weir’s 2021 science fiction novel of the same name, “Project Hail Mary” from directors Phil Lord and Christopher Miller landed in theaters on March 20.

item.title: NADC Burger’s taste, quality fails to make up for its high price point
item.description: NADC Burger proves to be nothing more than an overhyped patty, with a price tag richer than its flavor profile. The highly anticipated burger restaurant arrived in Westwood with the swagger of a must-try classic.
item.source:markdown: NADC Burger proves to be nothing more than an overhyped patty, with a price tag richer than its flavor profile. The highly anticipated burger restaurant arrived in Westwood with the swagger of a must-try classic.

item.title: UCLA track and field splits for weekend, sends athletes to Baton Rouge, Palo Alto
item.description: Home is not always on the schedule for college athletes. But for one Bruin, this weekend’s meet will offer exactly that. UCLA track and field will divide its roster across two competitions, sending nine distance runners to compete at the Stanford Invite in Palo Alto, California while sprinters and field athletes will head to compete in the Battle on the Bayou meet in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.
item.source:markdown: Home is not always on the schedule for college athletes. But for one Bruin, this weekend’s meet will offer exactly that. UCLA track and field will divide its roster across two competitions, sending nine distance runners to compete at the Stanford Invite in Palo Alto, California while sprinters and field athletes will head to compete in the Battle on the Bayou meet in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

item.title: Media Querencia
item.description: Cantando Bridging the gap between timeless gym staples and nostalgic favorites, this musical lineup provides all the right hype music for any occasion. Backed by chart-topping stats and throwback anthems,...
item.source:markdown: Cantando Bridging the gap between timeless gym staples and nostalgic favorites, this musical lineup provides all the right hype music for any occasion. Backed by chart-topping stats and throwback anthems,...

item.title: The Provincetown Independent’s reporters couldn’t find housing. So the Local Journalism Project bought a condo for them to rent.
item.description: Paying the rent on a reporter’s salary isn’t easy anywhere these days. But on the Outer Cape, it’s almost impossible. Massachusetts has some of the highest housing costs in the country. The problem is exacerbated on Cape Cod’s Outer Cape, a region that includes Provincetown, Truro, Wellfleet, and Eastham. In a community where the same...
item.source:markdown: Paying the rent on a reporter’s salary isn’t easy anywhere these days. But on the Outer Cape, it’s almost impossible. Massachusetts has some of the highest housing costs in the country. The problem is exacerbated on Cape Cod’s Outer Cape, a region that includes Provincetown, Truro, Wellfleet, and Eastham. In a community where the same...

item.title: UCLA baseball faces crosstown rivals USC on brink of program straight wins record
item.description: Twenty-straight wins. No other team in the nation has more than nine. Just two victories shy of matching the program record of 22 straight – set in 2010 by a team that featured future major leaguers Gerrit Cole and Trevor Bauer – the Bruins could make history this weekend.
item.source:markdown: Twenty-straight wins. No other team in the nation has more than nine. Just two victories shy of matching the program record of 22 straight – set in 2010 by a team that featured future major leaguers Gerrit Cole and Trevor Bauer – the Bruins could make history this weekend.

item.title: Amid internal uncertainty, the VTDigger’s new union contract guarantees journalists’ input on AI use
item.description: After a year of negotiating, the VTDigger Guild ratified its second-ever union contract on April 1 with VTDigger, the nonprofit news outlet covering Vermont. The new four-year agreement guarantees a 32.5% increase to the minimum salary for reporters, more paid time off, and journalists’ input on the use of artificial intelligence. Here’s what the contract...
item.source:markdown: After a year of negotiating, the VTDigger Guild ratified its second-ever union contract on April 1 with VTDigger, the nonprofit news outlet covering Vermont. The new four-year agreement guarantees a 32.5% increase to the minimum salary for reporters, more paid time off, and journalists’ input on the use of artificial intelligence. Here’s what the contract...

item.title: Scouting report: UCLA women’s basketball vs. Texas
item.description: No. 1-seeded UCLA women’s basketball (35-1, 18-0 Big Ten) will face No. 1-seeded Texas (35-3, 13-3 SEC) in the Final Four in Phoenix on Friday. The Bruins look to avenge a 76-65 loss to the Longhorns on Nov.
item.source:markdown: No. 1-seeded UCLA women’s basketball (35-1, 18-0 Big Ten) will face No. 1-seeded Texas (35-3, 13-3 SEC) in the Final Four in Phoenix on Friday. The Bruins look to avenge a 76-65 loss to the Longhorns on Nov.

item.title: The cost of a degree: What CSUN tuition and fees mean for students
item.description: College tuition isn’t always as simple as paying to take classes. For many CSUN students, the cost of obtaining their degree, tuition and required campus fees can create additional stress...
item.source:markdown: College tuition isn’t always as simple as paying to take classes. For many CSUN students, the cost of obtaining their degree, tuition and required campus fees can create additional stress...

item.title: UCLA beach volleyball set to compete against nation’s best
item.description: This post was updated April 2 at 9:24 a.m. Upsets. The best teams loathe them. The underdogs love them. And the Bruins fall into the former.
item.source:markdown: _This post was updated April 2 at 9:24 a.m._ Upsets. The best teams loathe them. The underdogs love them. And the Bruins fall into the former.

item.title: Dully’s Drop: Cronin must retool roster from transfer portal to forge championship-caliber team
item.description: College free agency is on the horizon. While the NCAA men’s basketball transfer portal does not officially open until April 7, players have already entered and many more will follow.
item.source:markdown: College free agency is on the horizon. While the NCAA men’s basketball transfer portal does not officially open until April 7, players have already entered and many more will follow.

item.title: UCLA men’s volleyball rides 20-win wave ahead of matchup against Pepperdine
item.source:markdown: “Success is a journey, not a destination.” Former UCLA tennis player Arthur Ashe famously coined it. And the Bruins know better than most that it is the climb that has defined them this season.

item.title: Bruins defeat UCI with strong defense, break loss streak at Anteater Ballpark
item.description: On a night, when their bats struggled to get going, the Bruins relied on alternative methods to win. With free passes, good defense and excellent pitching, top-ranked UCLA proved why it is the best team in the nation even when it isn’t blasting home runs.
item.source:markdown: On a night, when their bats struggled to get going, the Bruins relied on alternative methods to win. With free passes, good defense and excellent pitching, top-ranked UCLA proved why it is the best team in the nation even when it isn’t blasting home runs.

item.title: Theater review: Writing flaws, overacting mean ‘Spamalot’ fumbles the Holy Grail
item.description: With “Spamalot,” it’s unclear if the Holy Grail is half-full or half-empty. To the sound of clanking coconuts, the Tony Award-winning musical comedy galloped into the Hollywood Pantages Theatre on March 24 for a tour stop lasting until April 12.
item.source:markdown: With “Spamalot,” it’s unclear if the Holy Grail is half-full or half-empty. To the sound of clanking coconuts, the Tony Award-winning musical comedy galloped into the Hollywood Pantages Theatre on March 24 for a tour stop lasting until April 12.
